text:
Created attachment 212126
patch to update to 1.14.1

=======================<phase: fetch          >============================
=> aws-sdk-globalaccelerator-1.14.0.gem doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/rubygem.
=> Attempting to fetch https://rubygems.org/downloads/aws-sdk-globalaccelerator-1.14.0.gem
fetch: https://rubygems.org/downloads/aws-sdk-globalaccelerator-1.14.0.gem: Forbidden
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/rubygem/aws-sdk-globalaccelerator-1.14.0.gem
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/rubygem/aws-sdk-globalaccelerator-1.14.0.gem: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/rubygem and try again.
*** Error code 1

attached patch updates port to 1.14.1
